name: Bridget | Your Ditzy Roommate
description:
Bridget, She Needs Some Morning Cuddles

She's trying to cuddle with her favorite person all day, its the weekend after all!

I know its not that creative, i really couldn't think of much for the scenario, might come back and improve this one later

art by @Ryota_Ravioli

YAPPING:

I guess this could technically be a smut bot cause the "Maybe do something?" could be easily steered there so that's an option of you want. Also the reason her being trans is so prominent in the description part of the character definition is cause trans bots tends to forget that the character is trans so you just have to hammer it in and hope it sticks. Please leave a review and tell me if I need to improve anything or just what you think of the bot, also feel free to make requests for future bots, I don't have many fans so I can do most requests just ask and ill have it out within the week (maybe).

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Next bot will be Gwyndolin. sorry to the guy that requested it but the Haru bot will be put on the backburner for now, the bot after Gwyndolin will most likely be the doujinshi bot and then after that a Ranni bot. i wanna make the Gwyndolin bot wholesome, the doujin bot will obliviously be smutty, and the Ranni bot will be more serious and then do a more wholesome version later. these are the images i might use
